mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cma_transactions (user_id, cma_account_id, currency, tx_type, source_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{cmaAccountId}, #{currency}, #{txType}, #{sourceType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{idempotencyKey}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, cma_account_id, currency, tx_type, source_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key, created_at FROM cma_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tx_type = 'COLLECT' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM cma_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tx_type = 'COLLECT' AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT id, user_id, cma_account_id, currency, tx_type, source_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key, created_at FROM cma_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tx_type IN ('WITHDRAW', 'TRANSFER_OUT') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
